utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Each is fully specified with appropriate details: 'property' includes type, bedrooms, location, price, and features; 'financing' includes method, down payment, percentage, interest rate, amortization, and term; 'legal_services' includes multiple cost components and total; 'moving_services' includes service level, cost, currency, and packing/unpacking details; 'setup_services' includes utility package, cost, currency, and included services; and 'total_budget' provides a full cost breakdown. All required details are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution shows a purchase property (townhouse) with a purchase price of CAD $810,000, financed via a mortgage, with legal, moving, and utility setup services. The available ground-truth purchase properties include 'Modern Apartment', 'Family House', 'Move-in Ready', 'New Build', 'Commercial Conversion', 'Historic Townhouse', etc. Among them, the most similar to an 'urban Toronto townhouse' priced at CAD $810K is the 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD $750K, rating 6). For financing, the AI selected a traditional mortgage with a 20% down payment and 25-year amortization—this matches the ground-truth 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). Legal services include legal fees, title insurance, and processing fees totaling CAD $14,600, which aligns most closely with 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service is 'standard' at CAD $650, corresponding to 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). The setup utilities are 'premium' at CAD $280, corresponding to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
